teachers.name: Gaofeng Yuanmiao
teachers.notes: Dharma heir of Gaofeng Yuanmiao. Resided at Xifeng in Jianyang, then Daochang Temple in Huzhou.

teachers.name: Ji'an Xin
teachers.notes: Studied under Ji'an Xin for six years, receiving dharma transmission.
